fields.Name: HubSpot
fields.Description: HubSpot CRM integration for syncing contacts, companies, deals, and activities

fields.Name: contacts
fields.Description: CRM contacts with personal, professional, and lifecycle information

fields.Name: companies
fields.Description: CRM companies with organization details and firmographic data

fields.Name: deals
fields.Description: Sales deals and opportunities with pipeline and stage tracking

fields.Name: tickets
fields.Description: Support tickets with pipeline, priority, and category tracking

fields.Name: products
fields.Description: Product catalog with pricing, SKU, and billing information

fields.Name: line_items
fields.Description: Individual line items associated with deals, including pricing and product details

fields.Name: quotes
fields.Description: Sales quotes with pricing, sender details, and expiration tracking

fields.Name: calls
fields.Description: Logged phone calls with duration, direction, and recording details

fields.Name: emails
fields.Description: Logged email activities with sender, recipient, and content details

fields.Name: notes
fields.Description: Notes and annotations attached to CRM records

fields.Name: tasks
fields.Description: To-do tasks with status, priority, and completion tracking

fields.Name: meetings
fields.Description: Scheduled meetings with time, location, outcome, and notes

fields.Name: feedback_submissions

fields.Description: Current CNAME value detected in DNS

fields.Description: HubSpot portal/hub ID that owns this domain

fields.Description: Domain type: PRIMARY, SECONDARY, REDIRECT, etc.

fields.Description: Source URL path to redirect from

fields.Description: Apply only when original URL returns 404

fields.Name: isMatchQueryString
fields.Description: Include query string in route matching

fields.Name: isMatchFullUrl
fields.Description: Match the full URL including domain

fields.Name: precedence
fields.Description: Rule evaluation order — lower numbers evaluated first

fields.Name: hubdb_tables
fields.Description: HubDB structured data tables for CMS

fields.Name: published
fields.Description: Whether the table is published (live to CDN)

fields.Name: allowPublicApiAccess
fields.Description: Whether the table is readable without authentication

fields.Name: enableChildTablePages
fields.Description: Enable detail pages for each row

fields.Name: useForPages
fields.Description: Whether this table drives dynamic CMS pages

fields.Name: rowCount
fields.Description: Number of rows in the table

fields.Name: createdBy
fields.Description: ID of the user who created the table

fields.Name: updatedBy
fields.Description: ID of the user who last updated the table

fields.Name: publishedAt
fields.Description: Timestamp when table was last published

fields.Name: type
fields.Description: Workflow type: CONTACT_DATE_PROPERTY, COMPANY, TICKET, etc.

fields.Name: enabled
fields.Description: Whether the workflow is enabled and running

fields.Name: folderId
fields.Description: ID of the folder the workflow is in

fields.Name: createdBy
fields.Description: User ID who created the workflow

fields.Name: updatedBy
fields.Description: User ID who last updated the workflow

fields.Name: onlyEnrollsManually
fields.Description: Whether contacts can only be manually enrolled

fields.Name: enrollOnCriteriaUpdate
fields.Description: Re-enroll when trigger criteria is met again

fields.Name: isContactBased
fields.Description: Whether the workflow acts on contacts

fields.Name: objectType
fields.Description: CRM object type this workflow targets

fields.Name: stepCount
fields.Description: Number of actions/steps in the workflow

fields.Name: name
fields.Description: Internal event name (used in API calls)

fields.Name: archived
fields.Description: Whether the event definition is archived

fields.Name: properties
fields.Description: Serialized list of event property definitions JSON

fields.Name: type
fields.Description: Event type: CUSTOM, WEB_ANALYTICS, BEHAVIORAL, etc.

fields.Name: archived
fields.Description: Whether the event type is archived

fields.Name: objectTypeId
fields.Description: CRM object type this event is associated with

fields.Name: path
fields.Description: Full path within the file manager

fields.Name: isPrivate
fields.Description: Whether the file requires authentication to access

fields.Name: altText
fields.Description: Accessibility alt text for image files

fields.Name: archived
fields.Description: Whether the file has been archived

fields.Name: actingUserId
fields.Description: ID of the user who performed the action

fields.Name: actingUser
fields.Description: Email of the user who performed the action

fields.Name: category
fields.Description: Audit log category, e.g. PORTAL_SETTINGS, CRM

fields.Name: event
fields.Description: Specific event type within the category

fields.Name: objectType
fields.Description: Type of object that was affected

fields.Name: objectId
fields.Description: ID of the object that was affected

fields.Name: action
fields.Description: Action performed: CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE, etc.

fields.Name: description
fields.Description: Description of what this subscription covers

fields.Name: internalName
fields.Description: Internal technical name for API use

fields.Name: isActive
fields.Description: Whether this subscription type is active

fields.Name: isDefault
fields.Description: Whether new contacts are subscribed by default

fields.Name: isInternal
fields.Description: Whether this is a HubSpot-internal subscription type

fields.Name: legalBasis
fields.Description: GDPR legal basis, e.g. LEGITIMATE_INTEREST, CONSENT

fields.Name: requiredScopes
fields.Description: API scopes required to manage this subscription

fields.Name: inboxId
fields.Description: ID of the inbox this thread belongs to

fields.Name: assignedTo
fields.Description: ID of the user assigned to this thread

fields.Name: assignedToTeam
fields.Description: ID of the team assigned to this thread

fields.Name: contactId

fields.Description: Channel source: EMAIL, CHAT, SMS, FACEBOOK, etc.

fields.Description: Total number of messages in the thread

fields.Description: Message type: EMAIL, COMMENT, NOTE, ACTIVITY, etc.

fields.Description: Plain text content of the message

fields.Description: HTML/rich text content of the message

fields.Description: Name of the page where the form was submitted

fields.Name: values
fields.Description: Serialized JSON array of submitted field values

fields.Description: Timestamp when the form was submitted

fields.Description: Apply only when original URL returns 404

fields.Description: Include query string in route matching

fields.Name: isMatchFullUrl
fields.Description: Match the full URL including domain

fields.Description: Rule evaluation order — lower numbers evaluated first

fields.Description: Result type: SITE_PAGE, LANDING_PAGE, BLOG_POST, etc.

fields.Description: Full path within the CMS source tree

fields.Description: Whether this entry is a folder rather than a file

fields.Description: Serialized list of child paths JSON (for folders)

fields.Name: type

fields.Description: HTML embed code for this media

fields.Description: ISO currency code for the forecast amount

fields.Description: Category: BEST_CASE, COMMIT, PIPELINE, CLOSED_WON, etc.

fields.Description: ID of the associated deal stage

fields.Description: Owner ID who submitted this forecast

fields.Description: ID of the matched HubSpot contact

fields.Description: Tax type: SALES, VAT, GST, etc.

fields.Name: countryCodes
fields.Description: Comma-separated ISO country codes this rate applies to

fields.Description: State or province this rate applies to

fields.Name: inclusive
fields.Description: Whether the tax is included in the listed price

fields.Name: effectiveDate
fields.Description: Date from which this rate is effective

fields.Name: expirationDate
fields.Description: Date on which this rate expires

fields.Description: Whether the sequence is active and accepting enrollments

fields.Description: ID of the user who owns the sequence

fields.Description: ID of the folder the sequence is in

fields.Description: ID of the associated send schedule

fields.Description: Number of steps in the sequence

fields.Description: Total number of contacts currently enrolled

fields.Description: URL slug used in the booking link

fields.Name: userId
fields.Description: HubSpot user who owns this link

fields.Name: ownerPrioritizationType
fields.Description: How team members are selected: ROUND_ROBIN, etc.

fields.Name: defaultLink
fields.Description: Whether this is the owner's default link

fields.Name: bufferTime
fields.Description: Buffer time between meetings in minutes

fields.Description: List of custom domains for booking links

fields.Description: Locale/language code for the booking page

fields.Description: ISO currency code for paid meetings

fields.Description: Connected calendar type: GOOGLE, OFFICE_365, etc.

fields.Description: URL of the data source file

fields.Name: schemaId
fields.Description: ID of the associated data schema

fields.Description: Completion records for a specific custom behavioral event type. Parameterized by eventDefinitionName.

fields.Description: Send status: QUEUED, SENDING, SENT, FAILED
